2026-02-27T01:42:51.3268439Z Post job cleanup.
2026-02-27T01:42:51.4667811Z [command]/usr/bin/git version
2026-02-27T01:42:51.4714739Z git version 2.52.0
2026-02-27T01:42:51.4884887Z Temporarily overriding HOME='/home/runner/work/_temp/3a1a388f-2c57-478c-bdec-802c5d01f80f' before making global git config changes
2026-02-27T01:42:51.4890569Z Adding repository directory to the temporary git global config as a safe directory
2026-02-27T01:42:51.4902136Z [command]/usr/bin/git config --global --add safe.directory /home/runner/work/coding/coding
2026-02-27T01:42:51.4950649Z Removing SSH command configuration
2026-02-27T01:42:51.4956018Z [command]/usr/bin/git config --local --name-only --get-regexp core\.sshCommand
2026-02-27T01:42:51.5001323Z [command]/usr/bin/git submodule foreach --recursive sh -c "git config --local --name-only --get-regexp 'core\.sshCommand' && git config --local --unset-all 'core.sshCommand' || :"
2026-02-27T01:42:51.5251463Z Removing HTTP extra header
2026-02-27T01:42:51.5260147Z [command]/usr/bin/git config --local --name-only --get-regexp http\.https\:\/\/github\.com\/\.extraheader
2026-02-27T01:42:51.5345869Z [command]/usr/bin/git submodule foreach --recursive sh -c "git config --local --name-only --get-regexp 'http\.https\:\/\/github\.com\/\.extraheader' && git config --local --unset-all 'http.https://github.com/.extraheader' || :"
2026-02-27T01:42:51.5550120Z Removing includeIf entries pointing to credentials config files
2026-02-27T01:42:51.5561955Z [command]/usr/bin/git config --local --name-only --get-regexp ^includeIf\.gitdir:
2026-02-27T01:42:51.5596016Z [command]/usr/bin/git submodule foreach --recursive git config --local --show-origin --name-only --get-regexp remote.origin.url
